---
title: "How to make a Quarto-Website"
description: "List of tutorials and tips I used to make this page"
author:
  - name: Thomas Haase
    url: https://thhaase.github.io/Homepage/
date: 11-07-2023
categories: [Quarto, Blog] 
citation: 
  url: https://thhaase.github.io/Homepage/blog/2023-11-07-Blog-Tutorials/ 
image: preview-image.jpg
draft: false 
---

# List of Tutorials

This Videoseries explains the basics: \
[https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkrJrLs7xfbXcEKhTCKRSr2VXH4yiBeXo&feature=shared](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLkrJrLs7xfbXcEKhTCKRSr2VXH4yiBeXo&feature=shared) 
\
\
\
This tutorial explains how to **link a Quartowebsite and a Quartoblog** together: \
[https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2022-10-24-quarto-blogs/](https://samanthacsik.github.io/posts/2022-10-24-quarto-blogs/)
\
\
\
With this tutorial you can learn how to **customize** your quartopage: \
[https://ucsb-meds.github.io/customizing-quarto-websites/#/title-slide](https://ucsb-meds.github.io/customizing-quarto-websites/#/title-slide)
\
\
\
After that the only thing you need is the brilliant **quarto-documentation**:
[https://quarto.org/docs/websites/](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)

# Why Githubpages

Downsides: 

- public Code 

- Microsoft owns Github

Why it's still the best Option (for me)

- easiest deployment ever

- free !!!

- if you rent a custom URL its really [easy to connect](https://dafero.wordpress.com/2020/02/19/how-to-configure-github-pages-with-a-custom-ionos-old-11-domain/)
